calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-06-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Petitioners: You Kang Ling and Xue Zhen Lai, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Bao Ying Ling and Zi Hao Ling, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Vicky Sin.
Interpreter and Petitioners were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to: Ariana Bao Ying Ling and Tyler Zi Hao Ling.
Decree signed in open court.
